news.title:
Government reconsiders IDBI Bank divestment due to West Asia conflict.
Fairfax Financial and Emirates NDB submit bids for a stake in IDBI Bank.
news.summary:
Government reconsiders IDBI Bank divestment due to West Asia conflict.
Fairfax Financial and Emirates NDB submit bids for a stake in IDBI Bank.

news.title:
IDBI Bank plans to complete its privatization by FY27.
This move targets improved operational efficiency and growth opportunities.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank plans to complete its privatization by FY27.
This move targets improved operational efficiency and growth opportunities.

news.title:
Fairfax reportedly leads the bid to acquire a stake in IDBI Bank.
This indicates strong interest in the financial sector.
news.summary:
Fairfax reportedly leads the bid to acquire a stake in IDBI Bank.
This indicates strong interest in the financial sector.

news.title:
Bombay HC ruled RBI fraud rules violations aren't open to court scrutiny.
HC lifted stay on three banks classifying Anil Ambani's accounts as fraud.
news.summary:
Bombay HC ruled RBI fraud rules violations aren't open to court scrutiny.
HC lifted stay on three banks classifying Anil Ambani's accounts as fraud.

news.title:
Finance Minister to evaluate IDBI Bank's progress today.
This review may signal potential developments in the bank's strategy.
news.summary:
Finance Minister to evaluate IDBI Bank's progress today.
This review may signal potential developments in the bank's strategy.

news.title: RBI meeting discussed IDBI Bank's divestment, signaling ownership changes.
news.summary: RBI meeting discussed IDBI Bank's divestment, signaling ownership changes.

news.title:
Bombay HC lifts stay, allowing Bank of Baroda, Indian Overseas Bank, and IDBI Bank to tag Anil Ambani as fraud borrower.
Ambani assures cooperation with ED/CBI probes, commits to not leaving India without SC authorization.
news.summary:
Bombay HC lifts stay, allowing Bank of Baroda, Indian Overseas Bank, and IDBI Bank to tag Anil Ambani as fraud borrower.
Ambani assures cooperation with ED/CBI probes, commits to not leaving India without SC authorization.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
IDBI Bank approves transferring its Demat business to subsidiary ICMS, including NSDL and CDSL IDs.
The transfer, a related party transaction at arm's length, is valued at ₹5.5 crore over one year.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank approves transferring its Demat business to subsidiary ICMS, including NSDL and CDSL IDs.
The transfer, a related party transaction at arm's length, is valued at ₹5.5 crore over one year.

news.title:
IDBI Bank Ltd announces a strike notice on Feb 12, 2026 by AIBEA, AIBOA, and BEFI.
Notice issued under SEBI Regulation 30 & 51, highlighting employee demands.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank Ltd announces a strike notice on Feb 12, 2026 by AIBEA, AIBOA, and BEFI.
Notice issued under SEBI Regulation 30 & 51, highlighting employee demands.

news.title:
IDBI Bank saw exceptional trading volume on 10 Feb 2026, signaling high investor interest.
The stock outperformed sector peers and broader indices, showing renewed momentum.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank saw exceptional trading volume on 10 Feb 2026, signaling high investor interest.
The stock outperformed sector peers and broader indices, showing renewed momentum.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank opted out of bidding for IDBI Bank, as per sources.
Fairfax Financial and Emirates NBD have submitted bids for IDBI Bank.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank opted out of bidding for IDBI Bank, as per sources.
Fairfax Financial and Emirates NBD have submitted bids for IDBI Bank.

news.title:
IDBI Bank confirms interest and redemption payments for Omni Bonds 2015-16 Series III due Feb 9, 2026.
Interest payment of ₹87.8 Cr and redemption amount of ₹1,000 Cr were paid on schedule as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank confirms interest and redemption payments for Omni Bonds 2015-16 Series III due Feb 9, 2026.
Interest payment of ₹87.8 Cr and redemption amount of ₹1,000 Cr were paid on schedule as per SEBI norms.

news.title: IDBI Bank received three financial offers for disinvestment, ET Now reports.
news.summary: IDBI Bank received three financial offers for disinvestment, ET Now reports.

news.title:
Tata Motors, Bharat Forge, Sona BLW, and others may benefit from reduced US tariffs under the India-US trade deal.
IDBI Bank received bids for privatization; PB Fintech denied QIP plans, and Tata Steel reported strong Q3 net profit growth.
news.summary:
Tata Motors, Bharat Forge, Sona BLW, and others may benefit from reduced US tariffs under the India-US trade deal.
IDBI Bank received bids for privatization; PB Fintech denied QIP plans, and Tata Steel reported strong Q3 net profit growth.

news.title:
The government has received financial bids for IDBI Bank's disinvestment.
This marks significant progress in the IDBI disinvestment process.
news.summary:
The government has received financial bids for IDBI Bank's disinvestment.
This marks significant progress in the IDBI disinvestment process.

news.title: Kotak Mahindra Bank clarifies no financial bid in IDBI Bank divestment.
news.summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank clarifies no financial bid in IDBI Bank divestment.

news.title:
DIPAM receives financial bids for IDBI Bank privatisation, targeting sale of 60.72% stake worth ₹72,000 crore.
Kotak Mahindra Bank, Fairfax India Holdings emerge as contenders; announcement expected by March 2026.
news.summary:
DIPAM receives financial bids for IDBI Bank privatisation, targeting sale of 60.72% stake worth ₹72,000 crore.
Kotak Mahindra Bank, Fairfax India Holdings emerge as contenders; announcement expected by March 2026.

news.title:
DIPAM Secretary confirms receipt of financial bids for IDBI Bank's strategic disinvestment.
The bids will be evaluated as per the established process.
news.summary:
DIPAM Secretary confirms receipt of financial bids for IDBI Bank's strategic disinvestment.
The bids will be evaluated as per the established process.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra and Fairfax to submit separate financial bids for IDBI stake.
They aim to acquire 60.72% stake held by the government and LIC.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra and Fairfax to submit separate financial bids for IDBI stake.
They aim to acquire 60.72% stake held by the government and LIC.
